LSE-HS10-L4-10001300-HSWH-PCI-NAV-01 • HS World History Grade 10 • Industrial Revolution Labor Relations

The Picket Line Tape

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
What is the boy trying to decide?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Develop a complete explanation: state what the boy is weighing, explain what he wants from the listeners that he connects it to, and describe how the choice shapes the outcome he wants.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  HSS 10.3.4  |  HS World History: Industrial Revolution Labor Relations
